generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that cyber threats are now the #1 national security risk? While politicians debate, our civil defense systems are woefully unprepared. Just last month, a major city's emergency alert system was hacked during a drill. We need real investment in civil defense preparedness NOW. #CyberSecurity #NationalSecurity
